zh.lifeSummary: 當Adele de Monfort l'Amaury於1220年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯蒙福爾時，她的父親Amaury De Montfort VI28歲，母親Beatrix of Viennois15歲。她於1242年與Simon II de Clermont結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1279年3月28日在法國皮卡迪奧易波奧瓦斯享年59歲，埋葬在加拿大魁北克省拉 o-德-波奧普雷波奧普雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Monfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Montfort
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Mont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Juan, Cristina, Domingo, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Mariano, Ramon, Trinidad.
Catalan and French: topographic name for a mountain dweller, from Catalan and (Old) French mont ‘mountain’ (from Latin mons, genitive montis). Compare French Demont and Dumont .

nameMeanings.name: Adele
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

variants.name: Adel
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

en.lifeSummary: When Adele de Monfort l'Amaury was born in 1220, in Montfort, Île-de-France, France, her father, Amaury De Montfort VI, was 28 and her mother, Beatrix of Viennois, was 15. She married Simon II de Clermont in 1242. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 28 March 1279, in Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, France, at the age of 59, and was buried in Beaupre, La Côte-de-Beaupré, Quebec, Canada.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adele de Monfort l'Amaury est née en 1220, à Montfort, Île-de-France, France, son père, Amaury De Montfort VI, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Beatrix of Viennois, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Simon II de Clermont en 1242. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 mars 1279, à Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Beaupré, La Côte-de-Beaupré, Québec, Canada.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adele de Monfort l'Amaury 1220 in Montfort, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Amaury De Montfort VI 28 und ihre Mutter Beatrix of Viennois 15. Sie hat 1242 Simon II de Clermont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. März 1279 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Beaupré, La Côte-de-Beaupré, Québec, Kanada begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adele de Monfort l'Amaury è nata il nel 1220 nel Montfort, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Amaury De Montfort VI, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Beatrix of Viennois, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Simon II de Clermont nel 1242. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 marzo 1279, nel Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Beaupré, La Côte-de-Beaupré, Quebec, Canada.

ja.lifeSummary: Adele de Monfort l'Amauryが1220年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスモントフォートで生まれた時，父Amaury De Montfort VIは28歳，母Beatrix of Viennoisは15歳であった。1242年にSimon II de Clermontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1279年3月28日にフランスピカーディオイゼビーウベイスで59歳で死去し，カナダケベック州ラ クoテ-デ-ベアウプルeビーウプルeにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adele de Monfort l'Amaury(이)가 1220년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 몽포트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Amaury De Montfort VI(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix of Viennois(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1242년 Simon II de Clermont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1279년 3월 28일 프랑스 피카디 이스 보바이에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 캐나다 퀘벡 라 co테-데-보플e 보플e에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adele de Monfort l'Amaury nasceu em 1220, em Montfort, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Amaury De Montfort VI, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix of Viennois, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Simon II de Clermont em 1242. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de março de 1279, em Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, França, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Beaupré, La Côte-de-Beaupré, Quebec, Canadá.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adele de Monfort l'Amaury родилась в 1220 г. в местности монтфорт, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Amaury De Montfort VI было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix of Viennois, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon II de Clermont в 1242 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 28 марта 1279 г. в местности бовеи, оис, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности бопрe, ла кoте-де-бопрe, Квебек, Канада.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adele de Monfort l'Amaury nació en 1220, en Montfort, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Amaury De Montfort VI, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Beatrix of Viennois, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Simon II de Clermont en 1242. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de marzo de 1279, en Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Beaupré, La Côte-de-Beaupré, Quebec, Canadá.
